Gross merchandise volume reached **$33.7 billion**, up **33%** year over year, while total revenue rose **44%** to **$1.012 billion**, driven by Fair Financing and higher engagement across 119 million active consumers and over 1 million merchants. Adjusted operating profit improved to **$68 million** from **$3 million** a year earlier, with operating income turning positive at **$17 million** and net income at **$1 million** versus a **$99 million** loss. The company reiterated its full-year 2026 guidance and issued Q2 2026 expectations, including GMV of **$35.5–$36.5 billion**, revenue of **$960 million–$1.0 billion**, transaction margin dollars of
